results.notes: Client creation succeeded for client 88 (QA Search Create 202607092209), and the filtered client table returned only the created client. A broad expectMissing assertion saw Acme Dental Practice in the sidebar Recent list, not in the filtered results, so that assertion was treated as harness overreach. The flow still produced a UX finding: phone numbers in the client list are styled as clickable links but are href '#' dead anchors.

findings.title: Client phone numbers look clickable but do not start a call or show details

dedup_observed: client-search-create|[responsive] Client search results hide phone/email/actions off-screen on mobile
client-contacts|Primary contact phone and mobile render blank despite stored numbers
asset-ticket-link|Asset alert titles look clickable but do not open anything
design-audit|[a11y] No H1 on primary console screens + unlabeled icon-buttons/selects
design-audit|[color] Pervasive muted-text contrast below WCAG AA across console
